description: You are working as a drafter preparing manufacturing documentation for a T8 lead screw housing bracket. Using the 3D model already loaded in FreeCAD, create a drawing page using an A4 Landscape template. The drawing must include front, top, and right-side orthographic projection views of the bracket. Save the document to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/T8_bracket_drawing.FCStd and export the drawing page to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/T8_bracket_drawing.pdf.
